---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for the countdown timer
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation. (e.g. "I find it frustrating when...")

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement you want.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've already thought about.

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
